---
title: "Pigs"
---

### Pigs Available for Sale

| ID   | Breed       | Age      | Weight | Price       | Status    |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|-------------|-----------|
| PG01 | Large White | 4 Months | 35kg   | 150,000 TZS | Available |
| PG02 | Landrace    | 5 Months | 40kg   | 180,000 TZS | Available |

::: footer
### TriAnn Integrated Farm

📞 Phone: +4915510230189\
📧 Email: triann2026\@gmail.com\
📍 Morogoro, Tanzania

© 2026 TriAnn Integrated Farm
:::

`<a href="https://wa.me/`{=html}4915510230189`?text=Hello%20I%20want%20to%20order%20from%20TriAnn%20Farm" class="whatsapp">`{=html} Order via WhatsApp </a>
